TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Pisirian ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Cinkong Song, kwara sali buwan nya ga 418 buwan, 1,054 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 70% kyan ku 733 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 30% kyan ku 321 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 64%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Pisirian hya' ga Mararo'ong. tay mkyahu' na Pisirian hya' ga Cirarokohay. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pis~ɕirian ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ʦ~ʨinkoŋ s~ɕoŋ, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na pis~ɕirian ħjaʔ ɣa mararoʔoŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na pis~ɕirian ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨirarokoħaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Pisirian ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Cinkong Song, kwara sali buwan nya ga 418 buwan, 1,054 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 70% kyan ku 733 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 30% kyan ku 321 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 64%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Pisirian hya' ga Mararo'ong. tay mkyahu' na Pisirian hya' ga Cirarokohay. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pis~ɕirian ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ʦ~ʨinkoŋ s~ɕoŋ, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na pis~ɕirian ħjaʔ ɣa mararoʔoŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na pis~ɕirian ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨirarokoħaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
